type iDefault{{.ModelName}}Repository interface {
	// Create 创建记录
	Create(ctx context.Context, m *{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity) error

	CreateBatch(ctx context.Context, m []*{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity) error
	// DeleteById 根据ID删除
	DeleteById(ctx context.Context, {{.ModelNameLower}}Id int64) error
	// DeleteByIdList 根据ID列表批量删除
	DeleteByIdList(ctx context.Context, {{.ModelNameLower}}Ids []int64) error

	DeleteByCondition(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) error

	// UpdateMapById 根据ID更新Map数据
	UpdateMapById(ctx context.Context, {{.ModelNameLower}}Id int64, data map[string]any) error

	FindListByCondition(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) ([]*{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity, error)

	GetPageByCondition(ctx context.Context, pageNumber int64, pageSize int64, cond ...gen.Condition) (list []*{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity, total int64, err error)

	Count(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) (int64, error)
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) Create(ctx context.Context, m *{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity) error {
	return dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).Create(m)
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) CreateBatch(ctx context.Context, m []*{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity) error {
	return dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).CreateInBatches(m, len(m))
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) DeleteById(ctx context.Context, {{.ModelNameLower}}Id int64) error {
	_, err := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).Where(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.Eq({{.ModelNameLower}}Id)).Delete()
	return err
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) DeleteByIdList(ctx context.Context, {{.ModelNameLower}}Ids []int64) error {
	_, err := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).Where(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.In({{.ModelNameLower}}Ids...)).Delete()
	return err
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) DeleteByCondition(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) error {
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(cond) == 0 {
		return errors.New("删除条件不能为空")
	}
	tx = tx.Where(cond...)
	_, err := tx.Delete()
	return err
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) UpdateById(ctx context.Context, {{.ModelNameLower}}Id int64, m *{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity) error {
	cols := make([]any, 0)
	{{- range $col := .Columns}}
	{{- if not (or (eq $col.Name "id") (eq $col.Name "created_at") (eq $col.Name "updated_at") (eq $col.Name "deleted_at"))}}
	cols = append(cols, dao.{{$.ModelName}}Entity.{{$col.FieldName}}.Value(m.{{$col.FieldName}}))
	{{- end}}
	{{- end}}

	_, err := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).
		Where(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.Eq({{.ModelNameLower}}Id)).
		UpdateSimple(cols...)
	return err
}

	_, err := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).
		Where(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.Eq({{.ModelNameLower}}Id)).
		Updates(data)
	return err
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) FindListByCondition(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) ([]*{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity, error) {
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(cond...)
	}
	return tx.Order(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.Desc()).Find()
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) GetPageByCondition(ctx context.Context, pageNumber int64, pageSize int64, cond ...gen.Condition) (list []*{{.ModelPkgName}}.{{.ModelName}}Entity, total int64, err error) {
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(cond...)
	}
	offset := int((pageNumber - 1) * pageSize)
	limit := int(pageSize)
	return tx.Order(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.Desc()).FindByPage(offset, limit)
}

	return dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).Where(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.Eq({{.ModelNameLower}}Id)).First()
}

	return dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx).Where(dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.ID.In({{.ModelNameLower}}Ids...)).Find()

	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(cond...)
	}
	return tx.First()
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) Exists(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) (bool, error) {
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(cond...)
	}
	cnt, err := tx.Count()
	if err != nil {
		return false, err
	}
	return cnt > 0, nil
}

func (r *default{{.ModelName}}Repository) Count(ctx context.Context, cond ...gen.Condition) (int64, error) {
	tx := dao.{{.ModelName}}Entity.WithContext(ctx)
	if len(cond) > 0 {
		tx = tx.Where(cond...)
	}
	return tx.Count()
}
